    Registers a new guest and returns their database-generated unique ID.

    Inserts a new table

    Adds a new table to the restaurant system. * @param id The unique identifier (number) for the new table.
    InsertTableCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for inserting a new table into the restaurant system.

    InsertTableHandler - Class in handlers
    Handles server responses related to inserting a new table into the system.

    Represents a request message to insert a new table into the restaurant system.
